title: roegneria interrupta
intro: Roegneria interrupta, also known as Chinese wildrye or tu guo cao, is a type of perennial grass native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Roegneria interrupta include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Roegneria interrupta include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
